PrimaryDurationHeading.html.source: Duration of care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms

PrimaryDurationText.html.source: This section asks about the duration of {CmpnName}'s care by primary veterinarians for LP/GOLPP symptoms. This includes any primary veterinarians who saw {CmpnName} since the LP/GOLPP symptoms first appeared. It also asks whether you switched primary vets because of how {CmpnName}'s symptoms were being handled.

PrimaryDurationDetailsPanel.title.source: About how old was {CmpnName} when you first consulted with a primary veterinarian about LP/GOLPP symptoms?

PrimaryDurationVisitsNumber.title.source: About how many times did a primary veterinarian see {CmpnName} about LP/GOLPP symptoms?

PrimaryDurationCost.title.source: About what was the total pre-insurance cost of these visits to primary veterinarians about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms?

PrimaryDurationCost.choices.DONT_KNOW.te.source: Don't know or prefer not to say

PrimaryDurationChangedVets.title.source: Did you ever change primary veterinarians because how they handled {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms?

PrimaryDurationChangedVetsReason.title.source: Why did you change veterinarians after {CmpnName} started showing symptoms of LP/GOLPP?

PrimaryDurationChangedVetsReason.choices.source: The previous vet said nothing could be done about {CmpnName}'s symptoms.
The previous vet couldn't give possible causes for {CmpnName}'s symptoms.
The previous vet said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were just due to age.
The previous vet ordered tests that I didn't think were relevant.
